data.name: LblDragToolInfo.Text
data.value: Compensate the offset when using a drag knife or brush. Note that the path will be modified to get the tip of the tool on the desired path.

data.name: LblDragToolTangentialEnable.Text
data.value: Use of drag-knife on tangential axis

data.name: LblTangentialInfo.Text
data.value: Add GCode commands for a tangential axis, e.g. for a knife.

data.name: LblTangentialDeviAngle.Text
data.value: Correct start angle if deviation is >
